restricted_mm {
  n0: 2
  n1: 1
  n2: 3
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[1,0]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 1
    text: "[0,1]"
  }
  tensor: "0"
  rank_lower_bound: 0
  rank_lower_bound_proof {
    flatten_matrix_proof {
    }
  }
}
restricted_mm {
  index: 1
  n0: 2
  n1: 1
  n2: 3
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[1,0]"
  }
  tensor: "a10*b00*c01 + a10*b01*c11 + a10*b02*c21"
  rank_lower_bound: 3
  rank_lower_bound_proof {
    flatten_matrix_proof {
    }
  }
}

  index: 2
  n0: 2
  n1: 1
  n2: 3
  p: 2
